summary: Completed comprehensive testing of enhanced WTI/Energy AI Trading Platform with multi-asset support, JWT authentication, MongoDB persistence, portfolio analysis, and spread trading detection

resolved_issues.issue: Fixed asset correlations endpoint routing conflict
resolved_issues.details: Reordered FastAPI routes to prevent /assets/{symbol} from catching /assets/correlations
resolved_issues.fix_applied: Moved correlations endpoint before parameterized asset endpoint

resolved_issues.issue: Fixed user ID reference errors in backtest and trades endpoints
resolved_issues.details: Changed user['id'] to user['_id'] to match MongoDB document structure
resolved_issues.fix_applied: Updated all user ID references in server.py

resolved_issues.issue: Fixed undefined ASSETS constant in frontend
resolved_issues.details: Frontend was referencing backend ASSETS constant causing runtime error
resolved_issues.fix_applied: Added ASSET_SYMBOLS constant to frontend and updated correlation matrix rendering

passed_tests: Multi-asset selector (CL, BZ, NG buttons) switches between assets
Asset cards show all three energy products with real-time prices
User registration at /api/auth/register
User login at /api/auth/login with admin and test user credentials
User authentication /api/auth/me endpoint
JWT token refresh functionality
Portfolio tab shows correlation matrix for CL, BZ, NG assets
Portfolio VaR calculations (95% and 99% 1-day VaR) displayed
Spread opportunity detection between Brent and WTI
System start/stop controls functional
Regime badge displays current market regime
Regime override controls (normal, event, trend, blocked) working
WebSocket connection for real-time market updates
Sign In button opens authentication modal
All navigation tabs (Dashboard, Portfolio, Backtest, Calendar, Settings) functional
Asset price switching and real-time updates
Economic calendar events display and triggering
ML prediction and analysis endpoints
Risk management controls and kill switch
Backtest execution and history retrieval
Trade history and position management
MongoDB persistence for users, trades, and backtest results

success_percentage.multi_asset: 100% (CL, BZ, NG support with correlations and VaR)
